title: Funny Misconceptions
wikitext:
[]: Funny Misconceptions             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sat Oct 24, 2009 8:53 pm What are some funny misconceptions you used to have about things in the series? For a while I didn't know that the nerve clips were built like headphones. I used to think that they just took the two things and punched them into the skin on their head. After they were done using them I thought they pulled them out of their head and kept them until they needed to be used again. I thought that was another one of the reasons why Shinji didn't like piloting. I was also confused as to why Asuka liked to walk around with what were basically scalp piercings. Any others?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Oct 24, 2009 9:03 pm That sounds like it would be... painful.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Sat Oct 24, 2009 9:28 pm I remember someone got Misato's near-catatonic trauma post-Second Impact mixed up with Asuka's reaction to her mother's suicide. I wondered if the person who fudged this just *wished* that Asuka had shut up for two years. :: laughs:: Another Asuka-related one: until I actually *watched* the series, I always thought the A10 clips she's always wearing were just weird-looking barrettes.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Sat Oct 24, 2009 9:33 pm I'm guessing my level of confusion while I was watching EoE for the first time would've been funny from someone else's perspective. I was soo confuddled!

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Sat Oct 24, 2009 9:40 pm There was the one time that I thought that that Rei and Toji started dating in Ep. 18 (I think, correct me if I'm wrong, when Toji mentioned something about Shinji to her and she got all red).

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sat Oct 24, 2009 10:28 pm Since it was only vaguely referred to in the first episode, and that it was "frozen", I thought the EVAs themselves were in part some sort of "lost" technology, and that EVA-00 would turn out to be the most kickass Eva of them all. ... well, at least it had a decent paintjob.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Sat Oct 24, 2009 10:32 pm I thought those were put on like hair clips (That they were being firmly held on by the pilot's hair)

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sat Oct 24, 2009 11:52 pm The bit of crazy information that brought me to the monkey site for the first time back in the day was someone having on a web site that Kaji survived the series and lead the attack on the geofont in eoe.

[]:             Quote Post by frogkun » Sun Oct 25, 2009 12:21 am I think I was pretty much befuddled by the entire series, actually.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sun Oct 25, 2009 2:42 am I use to think Unit one was made from Adam, just like the other evas.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sun Oct 25, 2009 4:27 am child of Lilith wrote: I use to think Unit one was made from Adam, just like the other evas.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sun Oct 25, 2009 6:04 am Alaska Slim wrote: It is, it's a composite of both that and Lilith, not sure which is the "majority" in that, I believe it was decided to be Adam considering "she" keeps the general shape of the other Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Oct 25, 2009 10:02 am MatrixRefugee wrote: Another Asuka-related one: until I actually *watched* the series, I always thought the A10 clips she's always wearing were just weird-looking barrettes.

[]:             Quote Post by ath » Sun Oct 25, 2009 10:20 am Fazmotron wrote: Also theres these two pics, one from the show, and one a fan art based on the first pic, which show Unit-01 being grown from Lilith. [URL=http://img35.imageshack.us/i/lilithunit01.jpg/] [/URL][URL=http://img20.imageshack.us/i/lilithandunit01.jpg/] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sun Oct 25, 2009 11:52 am Fazmotron wrote: Alaska Slim wrote: It is, it's a composite of both that and Lilith, not sure which is the "majority" in that, I believe it was decided to be Adam considering "she" keeps the general shape of the other Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Oct 25, 2009 1:43 pm Alaska Slim's right in regards to Eva-01 by the way. Lilith was just Eva-01's surrogate, it doesn't change the fact that it (the Eva itself) is from Adam like the other units and Angels are.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sun Oct 25, 2009 7:19 pm Righto, as I said I hadn't heard that one before. I thought it would be straightforward, Unit-01 from Lilith, the rest from Adam, but ofcourse I forgot that NOTHING IN EVA IS STRAIGHTFORWARD.

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Sun Oct 25, 2009 7:25 pm GasmaskAvenger wrote: I thought those were put on like hair clips (That they were being firmly held on by the pilot's hair)

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Mon Oct 26, 2009 10:20 am Xard wrote: haha, I thought that she had barrettes that looked just like A10 clips

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Mon Oct 26, 2009 10:48 am Sharaz Destler wrote: Xard wrote: haha, I thought that she had barrettes that looked just like A10 clips
